title: Dark Souls
description: Did you like the game Dark Souls? Do you want to run around with your weapons in Minecraft? Do you want to tumble against the Dragon? Then you can download this too)
body:
This is a resource pack for playing with weapons from the **first** Dark Souls

Works with **Cit-Resewn** or **Optifine**

Currently weapons from Categories: **Daggers**, **Straight swords**

# Daggers:
Bandits Knife | Нож Бандита (_Wooden-Netherite Sword_)

![Bandits Knife](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YM8LrXjD/images/602e432b66e0a3e93d8161279e60f57ffb921979.png)

Dagger | Кинжал (_Wooden-Netherite Sword_)

![Dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YM8LrXjD/images/a7952229406c8342429d11a55ecd2b94b9dac9e7.png)

Parrying Dagger | Парирующий Кинжал (_Wooden-Netherite Sword_)

![Parryning Dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YM8LrXjD/images/1dfd1dfc70dd1ee48457c5e208ac3799efd78a63.png)

Ghost Blade | Призрачный Клинок (_Wooden-Netherite Sword_)

![Ghost Blade](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YM8LrXjD/images/7782ce43c6e11c3cbe9288f032f299e6cc1d66c3.png)

Priscillas Dagger | Кинжал Присциллы (_Wooden-Netherite Sword_)

![Priscillas Dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YM8LrXjD/images/c600eaee7f7c667dacb5ce74589d34a7115f33fa.png)

Dark Silver Tracer | Темный Серебряный След (_Wooden-Netherite Sword_)

![Dark Silver Tracer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/YM8LrXjD/images/7d0f49a91601c7b9fc71e4ceecb73d0b6c71660a.png)
